emails.subject: ABC news
emails.body: ABC news Hi Shelley, Is there any way we can get a heads up as to when our "photo op" with Claire Shipman will air? It looks like it will be a nice piece and I would like to catch it. Thanks, Bill

emails.subject: Re: ABC news
emails.body: Re: ABC news Tomorrow morning! Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: ABC news
emails.body: RE: ABC news Yea! Thank you so much! I'll try and set a VCR. Bill To: Bell, Bill
